calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2006 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2006 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-14-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-14-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Richard John Massa, Esq. for Petitioner: David Lowen, as Guardian at litem for: Amber Lowen, a minor Claimant. Counsel motioned to waive the appearance of the witnesses and to consider the filed declarations. After reviewing the declarations in the file, court granted the motion to waive the appearances of the witnesses.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Medical $5,323.00
Attorney's Fees $4,677.00
A net balance of $40,000.00 will be placed in an annuity/college fund with Allstate Life Insurance Company. See scanned judgment for details.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.
